33.reason: [Error: This should not be 'else if'. The traversal should visit both left and right subtrees regardless of whether the left child exists. Using 'else if' causes the right subtree to be skipped when the left child is not NULL, so only the leftmost leaf is printed.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.5 , reason:  Error: Using else if causes only left child to be traversed when it exists, completely skipping the right subtree. This misses many leaf nodes.
